executives.name: William Sheriff
executives.background: Mr. Sheriff is the founder and Executive Chairman of enCore Energy Corp. He has over 30 years of experience in the minerals industry and was previously the Chairman and CEO of Uranium One Inc.

executives.name: Paul Goranson
executives.background: Mr. Goranson has over 30 years of experience in the uranium industry. He previously served as Chief Operating Officer of Energy Fuels Inc. and President of Cameco Resources.

executives.name: Carrie Mierkey
executives.background: Ms. Mierkey is a Certified Public Accountant with over 15 years of experience in finance and accounting within the mining industry, including roles at Energy Fuels Inc. and Cameco Resources.

executives.name: Peter Luthiger
executives.background: Mr. Luthiger has over 35 years of experience in the uranium industry, specializing in regulatory affairs, licensing, and environmental management.

board_of_directors.name: William Sheriff
board_of_directors.background: Founder and Executive Chairman of the Company.

board_of_directors.name: Paul Goranson
board_of_directors.background: CEO and Director of the Company.

board_of_directors.name: Richard Cherry
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Cherry is a veteran executive in the nuclear industry, having served as President and CEO of Cotter Corporation and as a Vice President of General Atomics.

board_of_directors.name: Mark Pelizza
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Pelizza has over 40 years of experience in the uranium industry, primarily with Uranium Resources, Inc. (now Westwater Resources).

board_of_directors.name: Susan Hoxie-Key
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Hoxie-Key is a nuclear engineer with over 30 years of experience in the nuclear fuel cycle, including a long career at Southern Nuclear Operating Company.

sources.source_description: SEC Form 10-K Annual Report for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2023
